title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its breakthrough in reducing inference cost and compute demand while maintaining intelligence. The video examines the model within the context of the open versus closed AI research race, noting different incentives between nations driving LLM development strategies.
